title: The Bellweather Murders
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A former state investigator returns to a lakeside town after the beloved bell-ringer is found murdered inside the church tower, uncovering a town built on a decades-old lie.
long_description: In Bellweather, Maine, the church bell marks births, storms, weddings, and funerals. When Amos Vale, the town's aging bell-ringer and unofficial memory keeper, is found dead inside the locked tower after ringing a midnight alarm, former state investigator Mara Ellison comes home to bury a private grief and is drawn into a murder that exposes old loyalties, hidden inheritances, vanished evidence, and a second death no one wanted named. The novel is planned as a professional English-language 50-chapter murder mystery of approximately 100,000 words.
